_comment: NEWERA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT — SITE CONTENT CONFIG. This file is the single source of truth for all editable content, colors, links, and toggles across the website. Mary Ann (designer) edits this JSON file and the site content updates throughout the codebase. See Section 8 of the project spec and the README for the edit-and-rebuild workflow.

global.tagline: The New Era of Property Management

meta.title: Property Management Houston TX | Newera
meta.description: Modern, investor-focused property management for single-family and small multifamily homes in Houston. Transparent reporting, 24/7 portal access, real human support.

hero.headline: Modern Property Management for Houston Investors.
hero.subheadline: We manage your single-family and small multifamily properties with the transparency, technology, and investor focus you deserve — whether you're across town or across the country.

services.headline: Everything Your Investment Needs
services.subheadline: Four pillars of professional property management — covering every stage of ownership from first listing to long-term asset protection.

cards.title: Marketing, Leasing & Tenant Screening
cards.description: We list your property across all major rental platforms, conduct professional showings, and rigorously screen every applicant — credit, criminal, employment, and rental history — to place long-term, qualified residents fast.

cards.title: Rent Collection & Owner Reporting
cards.description: Rent arrives in your account on time through secure online payments. Monthly owner statements, real-time income tracking, and year-end tax documents — all available 24/7 in your owner portal.

cards.title: Maintenance & Vendor Management
cards.description: Every repair handled by vetted, licensed vendors. Residents submit requests online, work orders are tracked live, and every job is photo-documented — so you always know what was done and why.

cards.title: Inspections & Property Oversight
cards.description: Move-in, mid-lease, and move-out inspections — all with full photo documentation uploaded to your portal. We catch issues early to protect your property's long-term value.

about.headline: A New Era of Property Management in Houston
paragraphs: Newera Property Management wasn't born in a corporate office — it was born from frustration. Our founders have spent years in the trenches: buying distressed properties, renovating them, managing rehabilitation timelines and contractor relationships, and learning what it takes to keep a property profitable and well-maintained. As our fix-and-flip portfolio grew into rental holdings, we realized that most property management companies don't think the way investors think. They treat properties like files, not assets. They optimize for their commission, not your long-term wealth. So we built Newera as the property management company we wished existed when we started out.

Because we own and actively manage properties ourselves, we bring something most traditional property managers lack: real investor perspective. We understand renovation economics. We know which repairs protect property value and which ones are unnecessary. We recognize that responsive maintenance isn't an expense — it's an investment in asset protection. Every decision we make is informed by our own property holdings. We don't just manage your investments; we manage them the way we'd manage our own.

Today, Newera combines our decade of hands-on real estate experience with modern property management technology. We're a licensed Texas broker focused exclusively on Houston single-family and small multifamily properties — the same properties we invest in ourselves. That alignment means your success is our success.

differentiators.title: Anywhere, Anytime Access
differentiators.description: Check your property's performance anytime, from anywhere. Our secure online owner portal gives you real-time access to rent payments, maintenance updates, inspection reports, financial statements, and property photos — all from your phone or laptop.

differentiators.title: Responsive, Real Human Support
differentiators.description: When you call Newera, a real person answers. Our dedicated support team is available by phone during business hours, with 24/7 emergency line for critical maintenance issues.

differentiators.title: Transparent, Photo-Documented Reporting
differentiators.description: Every inspection includes photos. Every repair includes before-and-after documentation. You'll always know exactly what's happening at your property.

differentiators.title: Investor-Minded Operations
differentiators.description: We're managed by real estate investors, for real estate investors. We understand property values, renovation economics, and what protects long-term asset performance.

featuredProperties.headline: Currently Available in Houston
featuredProperties.subheadline: Browse our latest rental homes and small multifamily units available for lease.
featuredProperties.fallbackText: New listings coming soon. Join our rental alert list.

trustStrip.headline: Why Investors Choose Newera
trustStrip.subheadline: We're new — and that's the point. Newera was built from the ground up around the things traditional property managers get wrong.

cards.title: Licensed & Accountable
cards.description: Newera Property Management LLC is a licensed Texas real estate broker (TREC #9016567-BB). Every action we take is documented and compliant with Texas real estate law.

cards.title: Modern, Transparent Technology
cards.description: Owners and residents get 24/7 portal access to statements, work orders, and photo-documented reports — no chasing updates, no guessing what's happening at your property.

cards.title: Run by Real Estate Investors
cards.description: Our founders come from home-buying and fix-and-flip backgrounds. We understand property values, renovation trade-offs, and what it takes to protect a long-term investment.

testimonials.headline: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subheadline: Real feedback from the owners and residents we serve.

residentCta.headline: Currently Renting With Us?
residentCta.cardSubtext: Pay rent, submit maintenance requests, and manage your lease — all in one place.

finalCta.headline: Ready to Simplify Your Property Management?
finalCta.subtext: Schedule a free consultation with our team. We'll analyze your portfolio, answer your questions, and show you exactly how Newera can work for you.
